candidate_definition_hints.text: ***NOTE**: This branch is compatible with Godot 4.x. Older versions of Godot (3.x) are supported on the `godot-3.x`-branch as found [here](https://github.com/2shady4u/godot-sqlite/tree/godot-3.x).*
